c21885.st: To the church of [the] Thessalonians in God our Father

c21887.st: Grace and peace to you from God our Father

c21889.st: We are obligated to thank God for you all the time, brothers,

c21891.st: because your faith is growing more and more,

c21892.st: and your love for one another is increasing.

c21893.st: That is why we boast among God᾽s churches

c21894.st: about your perseverance and faith in the face of all [the] persecution and affliction

c21896.st: [All this is] clear evidence of God᾽s righteous judgment.

c21897.st: And so you will be counted worthy of the kingdom of God,

c21899.st: After all, [it is] only right for God

c21900.st: to repay with affliction those who afflict you,

c21901.st: and to grant relief to you who are oppressed and to us [as well],

c21902.st: [when] the Lord Jesus is revealed from heaven

c21903.st: with His mighty angels in blazing fire.

c21904.st: He will inflict vengeance on those who do not know God

c21905.st: and do not obey the gospel of our Lord Jesus.

c21907.st: of eternal destruction, separated from [the] presence of the Lord and the glory of His might,

c21908.st: He comes to be glorified in His saints

c21909.st: and regarded with wonder by all who have believed,

c21910.st: including you who have believed our testimony.

c21912.st: To this end, we always pray for you,

c21913.st: that our God will count you worthy of [His] calling,

c21914.st: and [that] He will powerfully fulfill [your] every good desire

c21916.st: so that the name of our Lord Jesus will be glorified in you,

c21918.st: according to the grace of our God

c21920.st: Now concerning the coming of our Lord Jesus Christ ... we ask you, brothers,

c21921.st: and our gathering together to Him,

c21923.st: [or] alarmed by [any] spirit [or] message [or] letter presuming [to be] from us

c21924.st: [and alleging] that the day of the Lord has already come.

c21925.st: {Let} no one deceive you in [any] way,

c21926.st: for [it will not come] until the rebellion occurs

c21927.st: and the man of lawlessness (the son of destruction) is revealed.

c21928.st: [He] will oppose and exalt himself above every so-called god or object of worship.

c21929.st: So he will seat himself in the temple of God,

c21933.st: that I told you these things while I was still with you?

c21934.st: And you know what is now restraining

c21935.st: him, so that he will be revealed at the proper time.

c21936.st: For the mystery of lawlessness {is} already at work,

c21938.st: [will continue] until he is taken out of [the] way.

c21939.st: And then the lawless [one] will be revealed,

c21940.st: whom the Lord Jesus will slay with the breath of His mouth

c21941.st: and abolish by the majesty of His arrival.

c21942.st: The coming [of the lawless one] will be accompanied by [the] working of Satan,

c21943.st: with every kind of power, sign, and false wonder,

c21944.st: and with every wicked deception directed against those who are perishing,

c21945.st: because they refused the love of the truth

c21947.st: For this reason, God will send them a powerful delusion

c21948.st: so that they will believe [the] lie,

c21949.st: in order that judgment will come upon all who have disbelieved the truth

c21951.st: But we should always thank God for you,

c21952.st: brothers who are loved by [the] Lord,

c21953.st: because God has chosen you from [the] beginning to be saved

c21954.st: by [the] sanctification of [the] Spirit and [by] faith in [the] truth.

c21955.st: To this He called you through our gospel,

c21956.st: so that you may share in [the] glory of our Lord Jesus Christ.

c21959.st: we taught you, whether by speech or by letter.

c21960.st: Now {may} our Lord Jesus Christ Himself, and God our Father,

c21961.st: who ... has loved us and given [us] eternal comfort

c21964.st: and strengthen [you] in every good word and deed.

c21966.st: that the word of the Lord may spread quickly and be held in honor,

c21968.st: And [pray] that we may be delivered from wicked and evil men;

c21969.st: for not everyone [holds to] the faith.

c21973.st: And we have confidence in [the] Lord

c21974.st: that you are doing and will continue to do what we command.

c21976.st: into God᾽s love and Christ᾽s perseverance.

c21978.st: in [the] name of our Lord Jesus Christ,

c21979.st: to keep away from any brother [who] leads an undisciplined life

c21980.st: [that is] not in keeping with the tradition you received from us.

c21982.st: how you ought to imitate us,

c21983.st: because we were not undisciplined among you,

c21984.st: nor did we eat anyone᾽s food without paying for it.

c21987.st: so that we would not be a burden to any of you.

c21989.st: but we wanted to offer ourselves [as] an example for you

c21991.st: For even while we were with you,

c21996.st: of you are leading undisciplined lives

c22000.st: and urge ... by our Lord Jesus Christ

c22003.st: But [as for] you, brothers, {do} not grow weary

c22005.st: anyone who {does} not obey the instructions we have given in [this] letter.

c22008.st: so that he may be ashamed.

c22009.st: Yet {do} not regard [him] as an enemy,

c22011.st: Now {may} the Lord of peace Himself give you peace

c22013.st: The Lord [be] with all of you.

c22014.st: [This] greeting [is] in my own hand — Paul.

c22015.st: This is [my] mark in every letter;

c22016.st: it is the way I write.

c22017.st: The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ [be] with all of you.
